japanese_prompt: リモートワークと出社勤務の違いについて説明してください
model_answer: Working from home is more flexible than going to the office. You can manage your own schedule and avoid commuting. However, office work is more effective for team collaboration.

passage_context: A discussion about the pros and cons of remote work versus office work.

japanese_prompt: プロジェクトマネージャーの役割について説明してください
model_answer: A project manager is responsible for managing the timeline and budget. They are in charge of coordinating team members and ensuring deliverables are met on time.
user_utterance_text: A project manager is... responsible for doing... managing the timeline. They are... in charge of... coordinating the team members.
